task: Reshape a 12-element array into 4 rows and 3 columns
error_location: line 1: (3,4) gives 3 rows 4 cols, not 4 rows 3 cols
clarification_query: What shape argument gives 4 rows and 3 columns?
explanation: reshape(3, 4) produces shape (3,4) — 3 rows, 4 columns. (4, 3) gives 4 rows and 3 columns.
